title: Is anyone else experiencing issues sorting by a column in the dashboard table widget?
excerpt: I would like to sort my table widget on my dashboard using one of the columns; however, it doesn’t appear that sorting is an option - does anyone have a work around?

posts.author: ncsueventerchick (Caroline)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to sort my table widget on my dashboard using one of the columns; however, it doesn’t appear that sorting is an option - does anyone have a work around?

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml: I need this too. It’s so strange to me that it isn’t more important to others as it’s a main difference between using a table on a normal board vs a dashboard. I desperately need to be able to sort them
